description_long: This helmet features a smooth, rounded shell with a predominantly white exterior and several black and gray accent components. The front opening is large and circular, bordered by a black rim and flanked by two prominent side attachments that may serve as mounts or ventilation covers. The rear of the helmet is more enclosed, with a subtle ridge and two brown strap-like elements at the base, likely part of the retention system. The sides display integrated ear covers and additional structural details, contributing to both protection and comfort. The surface is mostly unadorned, with no visible logos or graphic designs, giving it a utilitarian and modern appearance. The helmet appears to be constructed primarily from hard plastic, with some rubber or foam elements for padding and comfort.
description: A modern, white helmet with black and gray accents, featuring a large front opening and integrated side attachments. The design is smooth and functional, with minimal decoration and visible retention straps at the rear.
description_view_0: Front view shows a large circular opening, black rim, and prominent side attachments.
description_view_1: Rear-side view highlights the enclosed back, brown retention straps, and side ear covers.
description_view_2: Back view reveals a smooth, rounded shell with visible retention straps and minimal openings.
description_view_3: Rear-side view similar to view 1, emphasizing the helmet's curvature and strap placement.
attribute_ventilation_pattern: Two medium-sized vents at the front above the opening, with additional small vent-like details on the sides; no large or patterned vent arrays visible.
